greeting.line: House rules bend for the clever. They break for the greedy. Which are you?
greeting.line_friendly: You're on the list. Don't make me take you off it.
greeting.line_hostile: You're not on the floor. You're not on the list. Leave.

options.text: I'm here to follow the rules.

quest_options.text: I want to prove myself in the Coliseum.

clever.line: Card counters, loud drunks, sore winners — all handled quietly. Bend a rule with style and I might applaud.

rules.line: Good. Cross the house and you were never here. Keep the floor smooth and the Crown stays blind.
